summary: Comprehensive testing of Reports Module completed. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verification via Playwright confirmed all features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reports/daily-sparklines returns 7 days by default
Backend: GET /api/reports/daily-sparklines?days=14 returns 14 days
Backend: GET /api/reports/daily-sales returns daily sales summary with all fields
Backend: GET /api/reports/daily-sales without date uses today
Backend: GET /api/reports/top-products-extended returns top 10 by default with sparklines
Backend: GET /api/reports/top-products-extended?limit=20 returns 20 products
Backend: GET /api/reports/top-products-extended?limit=30 returns 30 products
Backend: GET /api/reports/void-audit returns void audit data with authorizer breakdown
Backend: GET /api/reports/profit-loss returns P&L data with revenue, costs, profit sections
Backend: GET /api/reports/taxes returns tax collection data with daily breakdown
Backend: GET /api/reports/cash-close returns cash close data by payment method
Backend: GET /api/reports/sales-by-type returns sales by type
Backend: GET /api/reports/payment-methods-breakdown returns payment methods with sparklines
Backend: GET /api/reports/inventory-by-warehouse returns warehouse inventory
Backend: GET /api/reports/transfers returns transfer history
Backend: GET /api/reports/waste-report returns waste data
Backend: GET /api/reports/purchase-orders returns PO summary
Backend: GET /api/reports/by-supplier returns spending by supplier
Backend: GET /api/reports/hourly-sales returns 24-hour breakdown
Frontend: Reports page loads with data-testid='reports-page'
Frontend: 4 collapsible categories present (Ventas y Caja, Inventario y Almacén, Compras y Fiscal, Auditoría y Operaciones)
Frontend: data-testid='category-sales', 'category-inventory', 'category-purchasing', 'category-audit' all present
Frontend: Date presets work (Hoy, Ayer, Esta Semana, Este Mes)
Frontend: Date range inputs present (data-testid='date-from', 'date-to')
Frontend: Daily Sales (Cierre del Día) loads with summary cards and 7-day trend chart
Frontend: Top Products report loads with 10/20/30 selector and sparklines
Frontend: Void Audit report loads with summary cards and authorizer breakdown section
Frontend: Profit & Loss report loads with income and costs panels
Frontend: Taxes report loads with ITBIS/Propina breakdown and daily table
Frontend: Export to Excel button present and enabled (data-testid='export-excel-btn')
Frontend: Export to PDF button present (data-testid='export-pdf-btn')
Frontend: Print button present (data-testid='print-btn')
Frontend: Email input and send button present (data-testid='email-input', 'send-email-btn')
Frontend: Reports menu item in navigation sidebar (data-testid='nav-reportes')
seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing February 2026 sales data (55 bills)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports Module fully tested and working. All 4 category sections expand/collapse correctly. All report types load data from backend APIs. Export functionality (Excel, PDF, Print, Email) buttons are present and enabled. Sparklines render using SVG polyline elements. Date range selector works with both preset buttons and manual date inputs. Real data from 55 bills in February 2026 used for testing. Backend endpoints tested: daily-sparklines, daily-sales, top-products-extended, void-audit, profit-loss, taxes, cash-close, sales-by-type, payment-methods-breakdown, inventory-by-warehouse, transfers, waste-report, purchase-orders, by-supplier, hourly-sales.
